name: slicer
description: SlicerVM skills for Claude Code: Linux microVM workflows, RustFS S3-compatible storage, and k3sup Kubernetes provisioning.

plugins.name: use-slicer
plugins.description: Use Slicer to launch Linux microVMs for sandboxed builds, E2E tests, Docker, CI, and isolated dev environments — works from macOS and Linux hosts

plugins.name: use-k3sup
plugins.description: Provision K3s clusters with k3sup (single-node and k3sup-pro HA) on local, Slicer, and remote VMs.

plugins.name: use-s3-rustfs
plugins.description: Install and run RustFS, an S3-compatible object storage server, inside a Slicer VM and use it with boto3, aws-cli, or mc.
